$comment: Ch 5 — THE CORNER, scenario 1 (toe on the line — long two). Authored from SCENARIO_SPECS_v1.md + SCENARIO_VOICE_v1.md (locked 2026-05-21). Schema mirrors bb-1-baseline.json. Pair-read with bb-5-toe-behind — same release form, only the line varies. The puzzle is the position, not the math.

meta.title: ONE TOE IN.
meta.subtitle: CH 5 — THE CORNER, LONG TWO
meta.authorIntent: Toe on the line — 22 feet flat (NBA corner-three line). d=6.7, h_r=2.2, h_h=3.05. Textbook answer θ=52°, v=8.67 m/s. Verification: t = 6.7 / (8.67·cos 52°) = 1.255 s; y(1.255) = 2.2 + 8.67·sin(52°)·1.255 − ½·9.8·1.255² = 3.058 m — matches h_h (err 0.008 m). The chapter twist comes in the reveal: 'great shot, but the toe was on the line — that's a two.' The puzzle isn't the math; the puzzle is the position. Pair with bb-5-toe-behind for the chapter's central insight.

situation.questionRevealed: Find an angle θ and velocity v that lands the ball through the hoop.

subheadVariants.1: Came up short. The corner is a long way to ask the legs.
subheadVariants.3+: Short again. Power well below threshold.

subheadVariants.1: Front iron. The arc was short from 22 feet.
subheadVariants.2: Still front iron. Lift the arc.
subheadVariants.3+: Front iron again. Push the angle higher.

subheadVariants.1: Back iron. Pushed too hard on a corner release.
subheadVariants.2: Still back iron. Cut the velocity.

subheadVariants.1: Long. Too much pace for the distance.
subheadVariants.3+: Far overshoot. Power well above threshold.

subheadVariants.1: Air ball from the corner. Line drifted off.
subheadVariants.2: Air ball again. Aim for the rim.
subheadVariants.3+: Still air ball. Check angle and velocity.

ghostArc.description: Textbook answer θ=52°, v=8.67 m/s. Clean corner-distance arc — but worth two points because the toe is on the line.

hints.body: Corner — about 22 feet. Projectile motion still.

Two equations, two unknowns:
  x(t) = v·cos(θ)·t
  y(t) = h_r + v·sin(θ)·t − ½·g·t²
d = 6.7 m.
Substitute t = d/(v·cos θ) into y. Try θ near 52°. v in the high 8s.

workedSteps: Solve y(t) = h_h for v → v ≈ 8.67 m/s.

intro.headline: ONE TOE IN.
intro.subhead: Same release. Same form. The toe makes it a two.

subheadByFlavor.SWISH: Clean through. Worth two from inside.
subheadByFlavor.GLASS: Caught the square on the way.

miss.headline: LONG TWO, GONE

bracketHintByCategory.BACK_RIM: Geometry: θ near 52°, cut v by ~0.4.
bracketHintByCategory.SHORT: Geometry: θ near 52°, push v near 8.7.

miss.afterAllHintsCopy: All hints revealed. The math is on the table.
